description: Verify mutual visibility of the Moon for an EME contact between Tokyo (35.68° N, 139.65° E) and London (51.51° N, 0.13° W) on November 15, 2024, at 15:00 UTC. For RF antenna tracking, ensure the atmosphere and ground are disabled and the azimuthal grid is enabled. Capture screenshots of the Moon centered in the view from both the Tokyo and London perspectives. Document the contact details in a log file at /home/ga/Desktop/eme_sked_nov15.txt, including the target body ("Moon"), the agreed time ("15:00"), and both station locations ("Tokyo" and "London").
